# Python snippet
def process(items):
    # TODO: add type hints
    # FIXME: crashes on empty list
    return [x.value for x in items]

// JavaScript snippet
function fetchData(url) {
    // TODO: add retry logic
    // HACK: timeout is hardcoded
    return fetch(url);
}

-- SQL snippet
SELECT * FROM users
-- NOTE: add WHERE clause for production
-- OPTIMIZE: add index on email column
;
